name: JoeSandboxMCP
description:
A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for interacting with Joe Sandbox Cloud.
This server exposes rich analysis and IOC extraction capabilities from Joe Sandbox and integrates cleanly into any MCP-compatible application (e.g. Claude Desktop, Glama, or custom LLM agents).

key_findings: Official Joe Security project, MIT license
All network traffic to jbxcloud.joesecurity.org only
extractall() without ZipSlip protection (mitigated by trusted source)
sample_path allows arbitrary local file reads for upload

status_cleared.reason: SM cleanup: only full_pipeline pass is real pass. Needs re-verification.
